name: optimiziramsi-skills
description: optimiziramsi's Claude Code toolkit as ONE plugin — git safety net, house commit style, lean reporting, session continuity, structured review, work-management flow (+ looper/grind runner), instruction-system upkeep (caps/meta-lint/tripwires), pattern registry, worktree protocol, repo utilities, and one-time scaffolds. Opinionated concerns carry env kill-switches; guards self-gate on project config.
